meanings.definition: an argument opposed to a proposal
a person serving a sentence in a jail or prison
a swindle in which you cheat at gambling or persuade a person to buy worthless property

examples: He swindled me out of my inheritance
She defrauded the customers who trusted her
the cashier gypped me when he gave me too little change

meanings.definition: commit to memory; learn by heart
examples: Have you memorized your lines for the play yet?

meanings.definition: in opposition to a proposition, opinion, etc.
examples: much was written pro and con
